title: 3 RM, BD - SME Finance Solutions / 1 year SME Loan Experience / Hunter Role -  TOWN/ High Basic + Commission
description:
Seeking 3 Relationship Manager (Business Development) for Hire Purchase Division with commercial loans experience and brings along existing client base in SME.


Requirements

  • A self-starter and a team player with Degree holder preferably from the business / finance / accounts discipline and able to value add having good network with SME or Commercial Sales
  • Brings along relevant experience in Commercial Loans (Secured and Unsecured), Property Loans, Hire Purchase of Machinery and Equipment, Shipping Loans, Working Capital Loans and etc
  • Proven stability in a company, preferably two years or more
  • Good understanding of accounting and financial statements
  • Proficient in report writing, as he/she will be responsible for preparing credit proposals, which will include financial analysis.
  • A hunter’s sense, a desire for sales, a proactive and aggressive demeanour. Highly self-motivated, confident, tenacious and results driven.
  • Hardworking, good working attitude, perseverance and resilience
  • The successful candidates will be placed in different position level based on their working experiences/education level.


Responsibilities

  • Prospect for new SME customers and pro-actively market our financial solutions in Commercial Sales to meet their needs in commercial Loans (Secured and Unsecured), Property Loans, Hire Purchase of Machinery and Equipment, Shipping Loans, Working Capital Loans and etc
  • Manage and service your portfolio of accounts
  • Prepare credit proposals including financial analysis
  • Generate and achieve revenue target assigned
  • Report writing and responsible for preparing credit proposals and financial analysis.

Other Information

  • Central Town
  • Working Days/ Hours: Mon to Fri, 8.30am to 5.45pm
  • Basic Salary: Up to S$6,500 (exclude commission)
  • Monthly Commission payout upon hitting KPI
  • $100 Mobile reimbursement + Annual Variable Bonus up to 2-4 Months
  • Company vehicle provided for those with driving license.
  • For candidates without license public transport (Taxi/Grab) claimable.

If you possess the above-mentioned experience, interested applicant kindly send in your resume. We regret only shortlisted candidates will be notified.


EA License No. 14C7092

EA Registration No: R1110882

EA Personnel: Lee Ming Er

postedCompany.description:
At Search Index, we believe in working along closely with our clients in an enduring partnership towards successful career placement. We specialise in identifying and assessing candidates and recruiting them from junior to senior level roles across all industry sectors.

We provides end-to-end solutions ranging from

  • Permanent, Contract, Temporary and Project based placement.
  • Executive Search
  • Payroll and Staff Management

Search Index is committed in providing the highest level of service with our extensive knowledge of human resources, consultancy and search expertise.

We work with Local Small Medium Enterprise (SMEs) and Multinational Companies (MNCs) across various industries.
